# Gyeon Q2M Accessories Polish Wipe EVO Microfibre Cloth

Brand: Gyeon
SKU: Q2M-PWE4040C
Barcode: 8809432671442

Price: £5.50

## Product Images

- https://slickshifts.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/GYEON_PolishWipe-EVO_2.png?v=1714311570
- https://slickshifts.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/gyeon_polish_wipe_40x40-scaled.jpg?v=1714311570
- https://slickshifts.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/GYEON_PolishWipe-EVO_3.png?v=1714311570
- https://slickshifts.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/GYEON_polish_wipe_40x40-1.png?v=1714311570
- https://slickshifts.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/GYEON_polish_wipe_40x40_009fa3be-545a-4bff-b9c6-3620c8156437.png?v=1690034448

## Description

### Quick Polish Removal

#### REMOVE POLISHING OILS SAFELY AND EFFECTIVELY!

The perfect tool for the polishing process. Surface preparation is a key factor in the overall result of the detailing process and influences coating performance and durability.
Removing polishing oils safely and effectively has just become much easier.
With the 310GSM, double-sided Q²M PolishWipe EVO, inspection and polish removal get easy and simple.

SIZE: 40x40 cm
Pcs: 1

### SUPERB MAINTENANCE PRODUCTS

#### Maximum Performance - Highest Durability

We changed packaging and colours but also added a variety of new products, often demanded and asked for!

Dive deeper into the GYEON EVO Microfibre line and explore all news we have been working hard on for the past year!

### QUALITY

Quality of the tools and accessories used in car care is everything. Quality of the microfibre, of its edges or sewing, the absorbency of a towel and its resistance to dozens of washing cycles determines the results of every detailing process. Microfibre products are used while washing, decontaminating, drying, polishing, coating and maintaining every single element of a vehicle. They can make every action quicker and more efficient or ultimately ruin the final result. That is why we take our pride in providing some of the finest microfibre products for the car care industry.

### ADVICE ON MAINTENANCE

Machine wash, maximum 30’C. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron. Do not bleach.

sources.cleaned_content:
# Gyeon Q2M Polish Wipe EVO - Microfibre Buffing Towel 40x40cm

Price: £5.50
Stock: Low stock - Only 3 left in stock!

## Product Images

- https://www.cadetailing.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/Q_MPolishWipeEVO-40x40cm2.webp?v=1742904432
- https://www.cadetailing.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/Q_MPolishWipeEVO-40x40cm1.webp?v=1742904432

## Product Information

The Gyeon Q2M PolishWipe EVO is the perfect tool for the polishing process. Surface preparation is a key factor in the overall result of the detailing process and influences coating performance and durability. Removing polishing oils safely and effectively has just become much easier. With the 310GSM, double-sided Q2M PolishWipe EVO, inspection and polish removal get easy and simple.

### QUICK POLISH REMOVAL

As excellent surface preparation is crucial for the application of coating, we thought it would be a good idea to help you start with it right at the polishing stage. That’s the primary task of our Q2M Polish microfibre. It has two sides, with two different lengths of fiber. It’s edgeless and fabricated with the latest laser-cutting technology, for the safety and durability of the fiber itself. And surely it’s one of the best microfibers on the market, when it comes to removing polishing pastes and all types of oily residue. No matter whether you’re in the middle of your paint correction or would just like to use it with Q2M Prep before applying the coating.

Pack contents: 1 x GYEON Q2M PolishWipe EVO Polishing Towel

### Care Instructions

- Machine wash, maximum 30’C. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron. Do not bleach.

## About Gyeon

Gyeon is a Korean detailing brand that is global leader in high-end car care products, known for their innovative and durable ceramic coatings. They prioritize quality and advanced technology, constantly pushing the boundaries of automotive protection. With a focus on research and development, GYEON delivers solutions that superior quality but also very easy to use making it the go to for professionals and enthusiasts.

## Why Gyeon

- Cutting-Edge Technology: Gyeon is a pioneer in the car care industry, introducing the world’s first ceramic coating based on fluoro-modified polysilazanes. This ensures superior durability, hydrophobicity, and self-cleaning properties, providing long-lasting protection in just one layer.
- Comprehensive Product Range: Gyeon offers an advanced ceramic-based product line, catering to both car care enthusiasts and professional detailers. Their Q² collection includes coatings, maintenance solutions, and accessories, covering every surface from paint to fabric, ensuring a complete care system for vehicles.
- Industry Leadership in Paint Protection Films (PPF): Gyeon is the first brand globally to offer state-of-the-art self-healing paint protection films, complemented by dedicated ceramic coatings and maintenance products. This makes Gyeon a leader in providing uncompromised paint protection.

## Customer Reviews

No reviews yet. Be the first to write a review.

### Features:

The perfect tool for the polishing process. Surface preparation is a key factor in the overall result of the detailing process and influences coating performance and durability. Removing polishing oils safely and effectively has just become much easier. With the 310GSM, double-sided Q²M PolishWipe EVO, inspection and polish removal get easy and simple.

### PERFECT FOR POLISH REMOVAL

The Q²M PolishWipe EVO Towel is the perfect microfiber polishing cloth to use in your paint correction and polishing process. It is highly absorbent and very effective at collecting oily residue from the polishing stage. It is a double sided towel, with two fiber types to make easy work of polish removal.

### EDGELESS AND EXTREMELY SAFE

It’s edgeless and fabricated with the latest laser-cutting technology, for the safety and durability of the fiber itself.

Machine wash at a maximum 30’C. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron. Do not bleach.
